name: CryptoGuard
description: Per-transaction crypto trade validator powered by WaveGuard physics. One API call before every trade: resolves token, runs anomaly scan, checks rug pull risk, cross-references CEX/DEX pricing, and returns PROCEED/CAUTION/BLOCK. Also provides portfolio scanning, historical self-comparison, and new DEX pair discovery. $0.05/call via USDC on Base and Solana.
